summary: The diff implements fixes for the user registration flow across frontend and backend. All three registration paths (admin, driver, traveller) are addressed with proper mutation hooks, name parameters, error handling, and post-registration navigation. The implementation appears to cover all acceptance criteria for REQ-1.

hallucinated_features.description: Bus number length validation (6-9 characters) added to the driver registration form
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not specify any bus number format or length constraints. This validation rule was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Bus number whitespace/trimming validation that rejects leading or trailing spaces
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not specify whitespace validation rules for bus numbers beyond requiring a valid bus number.

hallucinated_features.description: Fix for unclickable UI bug on LoginPage and AdminDashboard by adding relative positioning and pointer-events-none to decorative overlays
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest only requests fixing the registration flow. Fixing unclickable UI bugs on LoginPage and AdminDashboard was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: In-dashboard bus registration form on DriverDashboard updated to collect a driver name field
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest focuses on fixing the RegisterPage registration flow, not modifying the DriverDashboard internal re-registration form.
